name: A Crown of Compromise
description:
***A year ago, she won her crown with a curtsy and a gamble. Now, she must prove it was not a fluke.***

Queen Seridyss is no longer the naive girl who traded on pity. After a year of grueling reform, she has brought a fragile dawn to Umbralith. But the shadows of the past are long. Summoned to the glittering, sun-drenched heart of the human kingdom, she is determined to renegotiate the tithe that strangles her people—not as a supplicant, but as an equal.

Yet the human court is a battlefield of smiling knives. Traditionalist demons plot her downfall from within her own ranks. And a powerful duke, seeing a path to ultimate control, offers a gilded cage: a marriage that would secure peace at the cost of her kingdom's soul.

Seridyss wears a mask of polished diplomacy, her filed horns dusted with defiance. But beneath the shadow-silk gown, her bioluminescent veins pulse with strategic anxiety and a fear she can no longer outrun: that to save her people, she may have to become the very monster she was born to be.

Part 2
Part 1
creator: syoko
